mapper.insert: MERGE INTO synced_camera_results t USING (VALUES (#{id}, #{recordId}, #{cameraCode}, #{cameraName}, #{status}, #{qualityScore}, #{screenshotPath}, #{errorMessage}, #{syncVersion}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)) AS s(id, record_id, camera_code, camera_name, status, quality_score, screenshot_path, error_message, sync_version, synced_at) ON t.id = s.id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET record_id = s.record_id, camera_code = s.camera_code, camera_name = s.camera_name, status = s.status, quality_score = s.quality_score, screenshot_path = s.screenshot_path, error_message = s.error_message, sync_version = s.sync_version, synced_at = s.synced_at WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (id, record_id, camera_code, camera_name, status, quality_score, screenshot_path, error_message, sync_version, synced_at) VALUES (s.id, s.record_id, s.camera_code, s.camera_name, s.status, s.quality_score, s.screenshot_path, s.error_message, s.sync_version, s.synced_at)

INSERT INTO synced_camera_results ( id, record_id, camera_code, camera_name, status, quality_score, screenshot_path, error_message, sync_version, synced_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{recordId}, #{cameraCode}, #{cameraName}, #{status}, #{qualityScore}, #{screenshotPath}, #{errorMessage}, #{syncVersion}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE record_id = VALUES(record_id), camera_code = VALUES(camera_code), camera_name = VALUES(camera_name), status = VALUES(status), quality_score = VALUES(quality_score), screenshot_path = VALUES(screenshot_path), error_message = VALUES(error_message), sync_version = VALUES(sync_version), synced_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
